message:
test(fcp-core): Add comprehensive lease module tests

Add 38 tests for the lease coordination system covering:
- HRW coordinator selection (determinism, failover, stability)
- Fencing token semantics (zombie lease prevention)
- Lease validation (expiry, supersession, quorum)
- LeaseRequest/LeaseResponse serde and variants
- LeaseValidationError display formatting
- Lease::new parameter handling

Fixes broken tests that used old Lease struct fields (owner_node, iat,
coordinator) which were removed in the holder-based refactor.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
